title: Akkam Pakkam Lyrics Kreedam
stanzas:
Akkam Pakkam yaarumilla
boologam vendum
andhi pagal unnarugae
naan vazha vendum

en aasayellaam
un nerukkathile
en aayul varai
un anaippinilae

verenna venum
ulagathile
indha inbam podhum
nenjinilae
aezhe aezhu jenmam
vazhndhu vitten

Akkam Pakkam yaarumilla
boologam vendum
andhi pagal unnarugae
naan vazha vendum

nee pesum vaarthaigal
segarithu sevaen anbae
oru agaraathi.

nee thoongum nerathil
thoongaamal
paarpaen dhinam
un thalai kodhi

kayyoduthaan
kai korthu thaan
un marbu soottil
mugam pudhaippen

verenna venum
ulagathile
indha inbam podhum
nenjinilae
aezhe aezhu jenmam
vazhndhu vitten

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Akkam Pakkam?

The music was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

Which movie features the song Akkam Pakkam?

The song is from the Tamil movie Kreedam.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Kreedam?

The lead roles were played by Ajith Kumar and Trisha Krishnan.

What is the theme of the song Akkam Pakkam?

The song beautifully expresses love and emotional connection between the characters.

When was the movie Kreedam released?

The movie was released in the year 2007.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Akkam Pakkam from the Tamil movie Kreedam, released in 2007, is a melodious and romantic track that resonates with the theme of love and longing. Featuring the lead pair Ajith Kumar and Trisha Krishnan, the song is beautifully composed by GV Prakash Kumar with heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar. Sung by the melodious Sadhana Sargam, it captures the emotional depth of the characters' relationship. The soothing tune and evocative lyrics make it a timeless favorite among Tamil cinema enthusiasts.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Akkam Pakkam, a melodious track from the Tamil movie Kreedam, beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Composed by the talented GV Prakash Kumar and sung by the melodious Sadhana Sargam, this song features the stellar performances of Ajith Kumar and Trisha Krishnan. Its soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar make it a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: In this world, there is no one else; I want to live this day with you.
All my desires are in your hands; I want to live in your embrace until my life ends.
In this world, I need nothing else; this happiness is enough for me. I have lived through many lives.
In this world, there is no one else; I want to live this day with you.
The words you speak are like a blessing to me, dear one, like a sweet melody.
I will watch over you while you sleep, every day, with my head held high.
In the darkness, your breath is always a comfort to me.
With my hands, I will hold you close and show my face in your embrace.
In this world, I need nothing else; this happiness is enough for me. I have lived through many lives.
You and I will walk together, our shadows merging as one.
Without knowing the time, my heart is soaring in the sky today.
Because of you, I understood the meaning of being born as a woman today.
In your presence, I discovered new windows opening in my heart.
In this world, I need nothing else; this happiness is enough for me. I have lived through many lives.
